nasb.text: Solomon went up there before the Lord to the bronze altar which was at the tent of meeting, and offered a thousand burnt offerings on it.

esv.text: And Solomon went up there to the bronze altar before the Lord, which was at the tent of meeting, and offered a thousand burnt offerings on it.

cnv.text: 所羅門上到耶和華會幕前面的銅祭壇旁邊，在壇上獻上了一千隻燔祭牲。

ccb.text: 所罗门上到耶和华会幕前的铜坛那里，献上一千头祭牲作为燔祭。
